content.en:
"Bone Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He didn't expect that this time there would be a bone transformation realm to make a move.

However, he didn't know who this Bone Transformation Realm existed was.

Due to the distance, the range of copying talents is not covered there.

Therefore, he has no way to know the other party's name by copying talents.

After killing the Grey and White Giant Bear, the Bone Transformation Realm departed.

Swish!

Ye Tian came to the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor and asked curiously, "Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor, who is this Bone Transformation Realm existence?"

"Lord of the Wind Fangs!" Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor said, "The leader of the top overlord-level force Chaos Wind Sea, the Bone Transformation Realm that only broke through at the end of the Ancient Era, is also a Lord who will repay him, so don't provoke him." "

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Through the action of this Lord of Wind Fangs, he also saw the strength of the Bone Transformation Realm.

The defense of this gray and white giant bear was not even able to break through several Nine Blood Transformation Realm primitive-level geniuses, and as a result, it was cracked with a punch in the hand of the Lord of Wind Fangs, and it was killed in a breath.

After the gray and white giant bear was killed, these Nine Blood Transformation Realm primordial-level geniuses left.

Time flies.

The creatures of the Ruins of the Dragon Sea were almost killed, but they did more killing.

Many of the weak races were exterminated, but the strong races were nothing.

Of course, some weak territorial waters have also suffered.

Although these creatures will be suppressed when they enter the territorial waters, they will not be able to deal with the weak territorial waters!

Wanlong's territorial waters were also invaded, but Ye Tiandu was the first to strike, thus destroying the attacking creatures.

But from beginning to end, the real bone transformation realm creatures in the ruins of the dragon sea did not make a move, such as the primeval golden monkey.

They also know that the territorial sea boundary gap is very strong, so they dare not casually break into the territorial sea boundary gap, otherwise there will be a risk of falling.

The gray and white bear stupidly broke in, and then lost his life.

The years passed, and suddenly one day, the creatures of the ruins of the dragon sea completely disappeared.

Apparently, the entrance to the rift was gone, and all of the creatures were removed.

For the top hegemon-level forces, this incident is just a small episode, and it is not worth paying attention to.

If a top-notch boundary rift like the Hunhe Boundary Rift opened a passage into the territorial sea boundary rift, it would be a real disaster, and if you were not careful, it would trigger the Ancient War.

......

Dark Sea.

Ye Tian and Heifeng Tianzu sat together again drinking and chatting.

At this time, the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor revealed an emotional report: "Endless Heavenly Ancestor, you have to pay attention to it, in the recent years, there may be a boundary gap land opening one after another!"

"Will the Boundary Rift Land open one after another?" Ye Tian frowned, "Why?"

"This is a rule, isn't it?" the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor guessed, "If a single boundary rift is opened, there is nothing wrong with that. But this time the ruins of the dragon sea were opened, and then they were opened in reverse, which shows that the barriers between the boundary rift of the territorial sea and the boundary rift are in an active period. During the active phase, any of the Boundary Rifts may be opened. Even, places like the Hunhe River Boundary Crack may be opened. "

"If the cracks in the Hunhe River are opened, wouldn't it be a big trouble?"

Ye Tiandao.

"Hmm!" Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor nodded, "It's going to be very troublesome, but as long as the Hunhe River Boundary Rift doesn't open the entrance to the rift that leads to us, then it's no problem, but I'm afraid that they will also open the entrance to us, then we will be the one who is invaded!"

Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor naturally didn't want to meet the powerhouse of the Hunhe River Boundary Seam, the Hunhe River Boundary Crack was really strong, and the overall strength was much stronger than the territorial sea Boundary Sea, because the personality was higher.

At the beginning of the primeval battle, the Hunhe Boundary Rift and the other two top Boundary Rifts only came a small number of powerhouses, and even their strength was suppressed, and they all caused the Territorial Sea Boundary Rift to fall countless Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and even the Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors fell by many people.

Until now, the territorial waters have not recovered!

It was also after the Battle of the Ancient that many Ancient Treasures were shattered, resulting in a lack of resources in the territorial sea boundary, making it difficult to give birth to the existence of the Bone Transformation Realm.

Otherwise, the boundary gap of the territorial sea in the ancient era really can't look down on such a boundary gap as the ruins of the dragon sea.

Knowing that the Hunhe River Boundary Rift could open at any time, Ye Tian was extremely eager for the improvement of his strength.

There was no way to break through to the Nine Blood Transformation Realm in a short period of time, so he went all out to comprehend the Ancient Golden Text, create the top Ancient Bone Technique, and make as many immeasurable bones on his body as possible to undergo bone transformation.

......

Before you know it, another long time has passed.

this day.

The worst fears happened.

The Hunhe River Boundary Crack is opened!

At the first moment, the Lord of Darkness summoned the high-level of the Dark Sea to start a meeting.

meeting.

The Lord of Darkness said very seriously: "The Hunhe River Boundary Rift has opened, I hope you all don't enter the Hunhe River Boundary Rift, the Hunhe River Boundary Rift is higher than us, the number of bone transformation realms there is also above us, and there are even more primordial-level geniuses, so I won't talk about it." If you enter the rift in the Hunhe River, the chances of you being discovered are too great. What's more, there is a hatred between our territorial sea boundary and the Hunhe River boundary, so once you enter, the chances of being killed are too high. Of course, the choice is yours, and if you insist on going, I will not stop you. "

Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor said: "The Lord of Darkness is right, in order to save your life, it is better not to go. "

The Lord of Darkness continued, "Once the entrance to the Hunhe Boundary Rift is closed, in order to prevent the Hunhe River Boundary Rift from also appearing an entrance to our territorial sea Boundary Rift, then the Hunhe Boundary Rift will definitely invade. Therefore, it is best for you to stay in the Dark Sea at all times. At least with me in charge, the Dark Sea is slightly safer. "

"Lord of Darkness, we see!"

A high-ranking member of the Dark Sea replied.

Soon, the meeting was over.

And after Ye Tian finished the meeting, he went to the entrance of the Hunhe River Boundary Rift.

Others don't dare to go to the Hunhe River Boundary Seam, but he is not afraid!

Anyway, it's a copy of the body, even if it falls, it doesn't matter.

And the person of the Hunhe Boundary Gap is higher and the strength is even stronger, so it is possible to meet a better opportunity when you go there!

When Ye Tian came to the entrance of the Hunhe Boundary Crack, there were not many Heavenly Ancestors here, and most of them came to see the excitement, and they would not go to the Hunhe Boundary Crack at all.

......

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, do you have to enter the Hunhe River Realm Rift?"

A Heavenly Ancestor asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, be careful, the Hunhe River Boundary Crack is too dangerous!" the Heavenly Ancestor advised.

"I know!"

Ye Tian didn't say much.

Soon, the crack inlet stabilized.

Ye Tian escaped directly into the entrance of the crack and entered the Hunhe River Boundary Rift.
